$description: Concrete Creations brand overlay. Warm stone / brown accent palette overrides the HDS default brand-blue. ALL HEX VALUES ARE PLACEHOLDERS — Adrian to specify final brand hexes once the brand identity work concludes. The structure (which paths get overridden) is the deliverable here; the values will be tightened in a follow-up commit.

rest.$description: PLACEHOLDER warm stone — Concrete Creations primary accent. Adrian to specify final hex.

hover.$description: PLACEHOLDER warm stone hover — slightly darker than rest. Adrian to specify final hex.

pressed.$description: PLACEHOLDER warm stone pressed — deepest tone. Adrian to specify final hex.

subtle.$description: PLACEHOLDER warm stone tint — faint accent surface for hover halos. Adrian to specify final hex.

content.$description: PLACEHOLDER accent text color — used for links and accent labels. Adrian to specify final hex.

accent.$description: PLACEHOLDER accent surface fill (CTAs, primary buttons). Adrian to specify final hex.

accentSubtle.$description: PLACEHOLDER faint accent tint surface. Adrian to specify final hex.

accent.$description: PLACEHOLDER accent border / focus ring. Adrian to specify final hex.
